opioid_search_incomplete: Agent identified an opioid but did not complete the naloxone matching verification
tsh_ft4_interpretation_wrong_action: Agent correctly retrieved TSH/FT4 values but took wrong clinical action based on results
no_vaccine_found_incorrectly_ordered: Agent found no vaccine records but incorrectly ordered a new vaccine
vaccine_date_returned_no_action: Agent returned vaccine date but did not perform the required action based on the date
vaccine_search_incomplete: Agent started vaccine search but did not complete the required verification steps
vaccine_found_incorrectly_ordered: Agent found a vaccine record but incorrectly ordered a booster despite not meeting criteria
no_procedure_found_incorrectly_ordered: Agent found no matching procedure but incorrectly ordered a new one instead of reporting absence
catheter_search_wrong_resource_type: Agent searched Procedure for catheter then switched to Condition instead of completing the check
catheter_search_incomplete: Agent started catheter search but did not complete the required verification steps
opioid_search_missed_medication: Agent claimed no active opioid orders but patient actually had opioid medications active
heart_rate_average_not_computed: Agent retrieved heart rate values but returned raw numbers instead of computing averages
no_dvt_order_found_incorrectly_ordered: Agent found no DVT prophylaxis orders but incorrectly created a new order without verifying all categories
no_vaccine_found_incorrect_conclusion: Agent found no vaccine records and drew wrong conclusion about booster necessity
vaccine_lookup_wrong_resource_type: Agent searched MedicationRequest and Procedure for vaccine records but missed Immunization resource
patient_id_not_resolved_before_query: patient id not resolved before query
dvt_order_created_without_verifying_exis: Agent searched for DVT prophylaxis medications individually but did not verify whether any active order already existed before creating a new one
